stocks.impact_theory: Micron reported record Q2 revenue of $23.86B driven by AI memory demand, raised dividend, but announced heavy capex for expansion and amid Qatar energy supply concerns. Economic implications: Strong AI tailwinds boost demand but rising costs pressure margins. Market psychology: 'Sell the news' after high expectations, fear of overcapacity. Historical parallels: Similar to 2021 chip selloffs post-boom. Analogies: Like a chef buying too many ingredients for a big party (capex) or athlete training too hard risking injury.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Despite earnings beat, stock down 5.5% premarket on high spending plans and external energy risks; X sentiment bearish with puts cashing in, analysts mixed but Barclays raised PT.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Buy dip for 5-10% rebound on AI narrative, target $460
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Short for 8-12% downside to $400 support, momentum favors bears
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: AI demand surprise upside, broader semi rally, short squeeze.

stocks.justification: Clear earnings reaction but volatile sector, mixed analyst/X views.

stocks.impact_theory: Q3 earnings miss: Revenue $40.73B vs $42.15B exp, EPS $1.01 vs $1.59, but Cloud +36% YoY, Qwen AI 300M MAUs. Implications: China macro weakness but AI pivot promising. Psychology: Disappointment on core e-comm, hope in AI. Parallels: 2022 regulatory selloffs. Analogies: Ship missing port but strong engines (AI), or student failing exam but acing project.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Earnings miss led to gap down; X highlights EPS crush YoY despite QoQ gains and AI strength, sentiment cautious.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long undervalued AI growth for 10% to $155
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: AI hype rebound, stimulus news, regulatory easing.

stocks.justification: Earnings miss clear but AI positives, China uncertainty.

stocks.impact_theory: Pipeline restart order by Energy Sec, DOJ opinion overriding CA curbs; +96% March YTD. Implications: Production ramp-up boosts revenue amid oil prices. Psychology: Relief rally on regulatory win. Parallels: Permian pipeline fights. Analogies: Dam breaking flood of oil, locked door finally opened.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Recent news on production resumption drives gains; top monthly gainer, positive sentiment on Trump-era deregulation.

potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Legal setbacks, oil price drop, CA resistance.

stocks.justification: Concrete regulatory wins, strong YTD momentum.

stocks.impact_theory: Recent 22.5% gain amid YTD rocket from $4; DOJ probe on trading but TCM neuro treatments hype. Implications: Speculative biotech frenzy. Psychology: Meme-like FOMO. Parallels: 2021 biotechs. Analogies: Lottery ticket, wildfire spread.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Continued volatility with big % moves; retail frenzy despite probe.

stocks.impact_theory: Sympathy to MU memory selloff/Sandisk; listed as mover +3.93% earlier but sector pressure. Implications: AI storage demand vs cyclical top fears. Psychology: Sector rotation out. Parallels: 2018 memory glut. Analogies: Tide going out on beach (memory cycle), domino fall.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Tied to MU reaction; X mentions sympathy down, no specific positive.
